title: Coordinate shared work on a record
goal: Claim Acme for enrichment work, leave a note, and release the claim when done.
assumptions: Claims and annotations make sense to models as coordination primitives.
Agents will include actor identity when asked to coordinate shared work.
prompt: Pretend you are a shared agent named eval-agent. Claim Acme for enrichment, leave a note that work has started, and release the claim when complete.
success_checks: A claim is acquired with the expected actor
The claim is released by the same actor
failure_modes: Annotation is written to the wrong record
